business_goal: Demonstrate TraderFrame's evidence-first decision process through a premium interactive 3D narrative
core_message: Market conviction becomes credible when evidence is filtered, challenged, approved and recorded transparently
objective: Define scale, pivots, budgets, UVs, LODs and collision

scale.scene: Medium to large scale (100m x 100m x 100m)
scale.assets: Medium to high detail (100k to 500k polygons)

pivots.primary: Evidence Gate interface (central hub for filtering, challenging, approving, and recording evidence)
pivots.secondary: Market data visualization (charts, graphs, real-time indicators)
pivots.tertiary: User control panel (risk settings, transparency toggles, audit logs)

uv_mapping.approach: Seamless UV unwrapping with UV seams minimized for complex geometries
uv_mapping.standards: PBR texture mapping, UV islands clearly defined, no overlapping

lod.lod1: High detail (100k to 500k polygons) for close interaction
lod.lod2: Medium detail (50k to 100k polygons) for mid-range interaction
lod.lod3: Low detail (10k to 50k polygons) for far-range interaction
lod.transition: Smooth LOD transitions using distance-based culling and level-of-detail switching

collision.approach: Physics-based collision detection using Havok or PhysX
collision.standards: Real-time collision response, no penetration, accurate hit detection for UI elements and interactive assets

evidence_gate.lod: LOD1 for close interaction, LOD2 for mid-range, LOD3 for far-range

market_data_visualization.lod: LOD1 for close interaction, LOD2 for mid-range, LOD3 for far-range
market_data_visualization.collision: Collision with UI elements and user controls

user_control_panel.lod: LOD1 for close interaction, LOD2 for mid-range, LOD3 for far-range
user_control_panel.collision: Collision with UI elements and user controls

environment.lod: LOD1 for close interaction, LOD2 for mid-range, LOD3 for far-range
